content: The Self-Refine framework’s iterative self-feedback loop can be augmented by incorporating the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a multi-perspective self-refinement system. Unlike the original single-perspective Self-Refine that only refines a single initial output, this hybrid system would generate contrasting candidate outputs first, then use each perspective’s feedback to refine the result beyond what single-direction self-feedback can achieve.
